rows.reference: Ẹ jọ̀ọ́, gbígbé owó mi kùnà lórí OPay. Owó mi sì ti sọnù.
rows.output: Eji bibi awami kunolori opi, awami sitisoni.

rows.reference: Mo gbé owó láti PalmPay sí Access Bank, ṣùgbọ́n ó kùnà. Owó mi sì ti lọ.
rows.output: Mwbe owo lati pampe si Asset Bank shugwa okuno owo mi sitilo.

rows.reference: Owó mi ti sọnù lórí Moniepoint, lẹ́yìn gbígbé owó tó kùnà.
rows.output: Awo mi tisonu lori Money Point. Leni gbibe owo tokuna.

rows.reference: PalmPay mi ti dínà nítorí KYC. Mi ò lè gbé owó jáde.
rows.output: Pampe, mi ti dina ni tori KYC mi o legbi owo jade.

rows.reference: Mo ṣì owó firánṣẹ́ sí akọó̀lẹ́ mìíràn lórí OPay.
rows.output: Mo siyo wo franchesi a kowale miro lo liyo pe.

rows.reference: Please my transfer failed on OPay and my money has been debited.
I transferred money from PalmPay to Access Bank but it failed and my money was debited.
rows.output: Mugbe owo lati pampe si Assess Bank. Shugbo kuno, owo mi sitilo.

rows.reference: My money is lost on Moniepoint after a failed transfer.
rows.output: Awamiti Sonu Lori Money Point Lengi Gbibe Owotokuna

rows.reference: My PalmPay is restricted because of KYC, I cannot withdraw money.
rows.output: I am a member of KYC, I am a member of the OJAD.

rows.reference: I mistakenly sent money to another account on OPay.
rows.output: I'm not going to let you go.

rows.reference: Ẹ jọ̀ọ́, gbígbé owó mi kùnà lórí OPay. Owó mi sì ti sọnù.
rows.output: Ejigbibu awa mi kuno lori okpe, awa mi sitisonu.

rows.reference: Mo gbé owó láti PalmPay sí Access Bank, ṣùgbọ́n ó kùnà. Owó mi sì ti lọ.
rows.output: Mogbé ọwọ láti Pampé s'íí Assets Bank ṣùgbọ̀ ókùnọ̀ ọwọ̀ mi sítì lọ.

rows.reference: Owó mi ti sọnù lórí Moniepoint, lẹ́yìn gbígbé owó tó kùnà.
rows.output: Ảwọ́ mi ti sọ́nù lóri Mònny Point lẹ́yìn gbibbé owò tókú náà.

rows.reference: PalmPay mi ti dínà nítorí KYC. Mi ò lè gbé owó jáde.
rows.output: Pampa mi ti dína ni tòri K.Y.C. mi o lègbé owó jade.

rows.reference: Mo ṣì owó firánṣẹ́ sí akọó̀lẹ́ mìíràn lórí OPay.
rows.output: Mo siyogwa fri nášè si akawwailè minran lori yo pè.
